introSection: Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dorney Park in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster featured a simple oval track layout, with bunny hills.

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dorney Park in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA.

This coaster featured a simple oval track layout, with bunny hills.
